title: PROJECT 10MILLION - 211info
text: T-MOBILE PROJECT 10MILLION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides internet access. Enrollees receive a hotspot data access point and 200GB of data per year for a 5 year period. Recertification is not required. 12920 SE 38th Street Bellevue, WA 98006 Eligibility: Families with children enrolled in one of the following government programs: -National School Lunch Program (NSLP) -Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) -Electronic Benefits Transfer (EBT or P-EBT) -Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF) -Community Eligibility Provision (CEP) -Food Distribution Program on Indian Reservations (FDPIR) -Medicaid -Head Start, along with foster youth, migrant, homeless, or runaway youth Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Proof of enrollment in a qualifying government program -Parent or Guardian first and last name, email address (not associated with a T-Mobile account), and shipping address -Student ID number, school district, school name LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Discounted Internet Service * Families with Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. T-MOBILE
